raw_output:
PR #148 review (Claude, Fable 5), fix/147-contrast-duration vs origin/dev, detached scratch worktree, real exit codes: cold-cache eslint 0, format:check 0, full vitest 322/45 exit 0, build 0; backend untouched (file list verified). FINDINGS (all nit): N1 comment overstates match to backend _fmt_duration (which always renders the hour part; new helper drops it sub-hour, deliberately per issue spec). N2 acceptance doc counted 4 process PRs in an 'issues' sentence; #142/#143 closed but not milestone-tagged on GitHub while the doc places them in the release. N3 fmtMinutesAsDuration renders <=-60 inputs wrongly — unreachable (bin means of Oura-sourced non-negative durations; no manual-entry path; backend rounds means). VERIFIED CLEAN: isMinuteOutcome rule exactly matches _OUTCOME_UNITS=='min' ({deep,rem,onset_latency,total_sleep}_minutes; sleep_score/avg_hrv/sleep_efficiency correctly excluded; efficiency x100 scaling stays numeric); predictor leakage impossible (single non-test caller passes r.outcome; default '' preserves old behavior); edges 59.6->'1h 0m', 0->'0m', owner's exact example 446.9->'7h 27m'/423.4->'7h 3m' test-covered; no other surface renders contrast bin means (TopFactorsCard=headline only, backend HTML=slope phrase only, heatmap untouched) so no SPA/export inconsistency; non-minute path byte-identical to prior rendering; acceptance-doc facts spot-checked (min_days=14, variance requirement, descoped issues open on v0.1.2, #147 closes via this PR so 'shipped in this release' is made true by the same PR per the docs-never-lead-code rule, all four claimed regression tests exist).

--- Post-review delta ---
Branch advanced during/after review: 70e2621 (reviewed initial tip) -> 4144ebe (docs-only: acceptance QA item 4; leg diffed the delta and re-confirmed) -> f5b365b (docs-only: acceptance QA items 5+6, owner-reported live results incl. the best-night tie-break finding) -> 3c3fb30 (fix round: comment wording nit fixed; acceptance-doc issues-vs-PRs phrasing nit fixed; #142/#143 milestone-tagged on GitHub resolving the bookkeeping half). Negative-input hardening nit dismissed (unreachable: bin means of Oura-sourced non-negative duration columns, no manual-entry path). Post-fix verification: prettier clean, effectFormat tests 10/10; full suite 322/45 green at the reviewed tip; delta commits are docs/comment-only.

findings.summary: Comment overstates match to backend _fmt_duration (sub-hour divergence is deliberate)
findings.reason: comment now states the divergence and cites the issue spec (3c3fb30)

findings.summary: Acceptance doc mixed PR numbers into an issues count; #142/#143 lacked milestone tags
findings.reason: doc rephrased (issues + process PRs separated); #142/#143 milestone-tagged v0.1.1 on GitHub (3c3fb30)
unreachable: contrast bin means of Oura-sourced non-negative duration columns; verified no manual-entry path
